property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: runCourseExplorationModel

error.message: Failed to execute GraphWalker for CourseExplorationImpl

testcase.error: java.lang.RuntimeException: Failed to execute GraphWalker for CourseExplorationImpl at com.eduplatform.mbt.runners.AbstractGraphWalkerRunner.runModel(AbstractGraphWalkerRunner.java:80) at com.eduplatform.mbt.runners.CourseExplorationRunner.runCourseExplorationModel(CourseExplorationRunner.java:16) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:569) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) Caused by: org.graphwalker.java.test.TestExecutionException: java.lang.IllegalStateException: No published courses from API; seed the DB (e.g. POST /api/v1/admin/seed) before CourseExploration MBT. at org.graphwalker.java.test.TestExecutor.execute(TestExecutor.java:251) at org.graphwalker.java.test.TestBuilder.execute(TestBuilder.java:125) at org.graphwalker.java.test.TestBuilder.execute(TestBuilder.java:129) at com.eduplatform.mbt.runners.AbstractGraphWalkerRunner.runModel(AbstractGraphWalkerRunner.java:74) ... 4 more Caused by: java.lang.IllegalStateException: No published courses from API; seed the DB (e.g. POST /api/v1/admin/seed) before CourseExploration MBT. at com.eduplatform.mbt.impl.CourseExplorationImpl.v_CourseListVisible(CourseExplorationImpl.java:35) at jdk.internal.reflect.GeneratedMethodAccessor14.invoke(Unknown Source) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:569) at org.graphwalker.core.machine.ExecutionContext.execute(ExecutionContext.java:277) at org.graphwalker.core.machine.SimpleMachine.execute(SimpleMachine.java:283) at org.graphwalker.core.machine.SimpleMachine.getNextStep(SimpleMachine.java:106) at org.graphwalker.java.test.TestExecutor.execute(TestExecutor.java:241) ... 7 more
